items.title: Jimothy, Meme and Muse
items.summary: Artists share tributes to the beloved raccoon, plus Sabri Sundos’s odes to Palestinian diaspora and memory.

items.title: Sabri Sundos Faces Catastrophe With Flowers
items.summary: “I am obsessed with autonomy and movement,” the Palestinian-American artist tells Hyperallergic in an interview.

items.title: How Jimothy the Raccoon Became a Hero of the Misfits
items.summary: The short-spined Seattle animal with an unfettered spirit has been honored in fan art, tattoos, and murals.

items.title: SVA Grads Make Art out of History’s Rubble
items.summary: The Art Practice MFA thesis exhibition rewrites what came before, pushing back against harmful systems and inventing better ways of living together.
